title: doratoxylon apetalum
intro: Doratoxylon apetalum, also known as the Philippine ironwood or ironwood tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Doratoxylon apetalum include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as being used as a natural remedy for wounds and injuries. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically or consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
